sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval sheet for BLUE_BATTERY_BLOCK, part/model MKK-000101, issued by 천진정석전자 for H&abyz on 2025/07/17.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines approval cover information, revision history, material list, QC control plan, inspection criteria references, and packaging specification for the supplied part.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_BATTERY_BLOCK and model/part number is MKK-000101.
Applicable models listed are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP.
Supplier is 천진정석전자 / 천진정석전자과기유한회사 and customer is H&abyz.
Material list identifies PC+GF30% GN2301F with maker LG.

QC control plan category marks PVS and Mass-Prod, with process controls for incoming inspection, storage, drying, moisture test, injection molding, inspection/packing, outgoing inspection, and shipment.

concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal indicates FDA, but FDA or another regulatory authority is not present in the source text.
No external regulatory standard is explicitly identified in the source text.
Revision appears as Rev. 00 on the cover and Rev. 0 in revision tables; these appear equivalent but are recorded differently.
Part number appears as MKK-000101 in the cover and QC plan, while one contents section lists 도번(PART NO) : MKK-000100.
